1,300 sq ft · Sleeps 9 · 1 King, 2 Double + 1 Queen. Fully equipped kitchen, balcony with pool and beach views, individually decorated by owner. Rebuilt from the studs post-Harvey — feels fresh and new. On-site management, laundry, BBQ, ping pong.

Sample Itinerary
Day 1
Saturday, Apr 4
Arrival & Island Settling
A short hop from Corpus — under an hour door to door. Check in after 4 PM, unpack, and let the group claim their rooms. An evening walk to the beach via Executive Keys' private boardwalk sets the tone: salt air, wide sky, and the sound of the Gulf rolling in.
Day 2
Sunday, Apr 5
Pool, Beach & Port A Exploration
Morning in the heated pool, afternoon on the Gulf — the boardwalk puts you steps from the water. Rent bikes or a golf cart in town for the afternoon, hit the fishing pier, or browse the shops on Cut-Off Road. Dinner on-island at Fins Grill or Venetian Hot Plate before an evening back on the water.
Day 3
Monday, Apr 6
Sunrise, Check-Out & Homeward
One last sunrise walk before the 11 AM checkout. Swing through Stingray's for breakfast tacos before the easy drive home. A short, sweet trip that punches well above its price tag.
Nearby Activities
Jetty Boat Island Ferry to San José Island~$25–35/person
Golf Cart Rental (1/2 day)~$80–120/cart
Deep-Sea Fishing Charter (4-hr)~$65–85/person
Dolphin Watch Boat Tour~$25–40/person
Beach Chair & Umbrella Rental~$40–60/set/day
University of Texas Marine Science Institute (free)Free
Agent's Note

Executive Keys is the best-value beachfront choice for a group this size. The 3-bedroom unit (1,300 sq ft, sleeps 9) fits your group in one cohesive space, no splitting across rooms or buildings. The heated pool and on-site management are strong advantages for a family trip. Important: The property was completely rebuilt after Hurricane Harvey and reopened in 2020 — everything is modern, fresh, and updated. No resort or cleaning fees are added on top of the quoted rate — what you see is what you pay. For a 2-night trip, this is the sharpest value on the island.

Note: Golf cart rental is not included — arrange separately through Jackfish Cart Rentals or Sandcastle Rentals in town (~$80–140/day). Highly recommended for a group with kids.

Cinnamon Shore North · Port Aransas

Starting from $1,513.16 for 2 nights · final price depends on room selection
Award-winning beachfront community on Mustang Island. Three resort pools including the Dune Pool (water features, lounge chairs) and Keira's Pool (infinity edge, poolside C-Bar dining). Boardwalk to private beach. On-site dining at Dylan's Coal Oven Pizzeria and Lisabella's Bistro. Golf cart rentals available.
3 Pools
Boardwalk
Poolside Dining
Golf Cart Rentals
Pet Friendly
Sample Itinerary
Day 1
Saturday, Apr 4
Arrival & Cinnamon Shore Immersion
A quick drive from Corpus puts the Cinnamon Shore community right in front of you — colorful beach homes, sea grass boulevards, and the Gulf peeking from every gap. Check in, orient the group, and make your first visit to the Dune Pool before dinner at Dylan's Coal Oven Pizzeria, steps from your rental.
Day 2
Sunday, Apr 5
Full Resort Day
This is what Cinnamon Shore is built for. Morning at Keira's Pool with drinks and snacks from C-Bar, afternoon on the private boardwalk beach. Rent a golf cart and cruise Grand Boulevard at golden hour. Kids can bounce between the pools while adults unwind — the infrastructure does all the heavy lifting.
Day 3
Monday, Apr 6
Final Morning & Departure
Last sunrise at the Stillwater Pool (heated, outside food welcome) before packing up. Stop at the community market for road snacks, then the easy drive back to Corpus — but with Cinnamon Shore in the books, everyone will already be asking about next year.
Community Amenities & Activities
Dune Pool · Keira's Pool · Stillwater Heated PoolIncluded
C-Bar Poolside Food & Drinks (Keira's Pool)~$15–30/person
Dylan's Coal Oven Pizzeria (on-site)~$20–35/person
Golf Cart Rental (community + beach)~$80–140/day
Reserved Beach Chairs & Umbrellas~$50–70/set/day
Paddleboard Yoga (Dune Pool)~$25–40/person
Agent's Note

Cinnamon Shore is the highest-rated property on this list (9.8/10) and the most resort-complete experience available on Mustang Island. The three community pools, on-site dining, and boardwalk-to-beach access make it genuinely effortless for a family group. Key consideration: The quoted rate includes a $157 service fee and $456.93 property fee — these are reflected in the starting price shown. This is the right choice if the group wants the full resort experience with everything on-site and minimal logistics to manage.

The Cinnamon Shore listing shows as a single beachfront property. Confirm exact sleeping configuration (beds, sq footage) when booking through the TAAP portal to ensure it fits all 9 guests comfortably. Ask about golf cart availability — it's strongly recommended for families navigating the full North community.

03
Full-Service Resort · Largest Pool in South Texas
Port Royal
Ocean Resort
"The largest lagoon pool in South Texas — four pools, waterslides, a swim-up bar, and the Gulf at your doorstep."
4 Outdoor Pools
Water Slides
Swim-Up Bar
Beachfront
On-Site Restaurant
2 Rooms · 2 Suites
Port Royal Ocean Resort & Conference Center · 6317 State Hwy 361, Port Aransas
⚠ Active Renovation Notice

Port Royal is currently undergoing property-wide renovations scheduled through August 1, 2026. During the stay (April 4–6), some facilities may be closed or temporarily unavailable, fencing may be visible, and certain pool or amenity areas may be affected. Confirm current pool and waterslide status directly with the resort before booking. This is an important consideration for a family trip where pool access is a priority.

Hwy 361 · Port Aransas · 3.5-star Resort
★★★½ · Resort Scale Amenities
from $396 /night avg
Starting from $2,326.66 for 2 nights · 2 rooms required · final price depends on room selection
210-unit beachfront condo resort on 25 acres. The largest lagoon pool in South Texas with Twisting Dunes waterslide, 3 hot tubs, swim-up bar, heated lap pool, children's splash pad, on-site restaurant (361 Bar & Grill), Sunday brunch, and a 100-yard boardwalk to the Gulf. Conference center on-site.
4 Pools
Waterslide
Swim-Up Bar
Restaurant
Boardwalk
Hot Tubs
Sample Itinerary
Day 1
Saturday, Apr 4
Arrival & Resort Discovery
The scale of Port Royal announces itself the moment you arrive — 25 acres of pools, fountains, and Gulf-facing suites. Check both rooms in together, get the lay of the pool complex, and head down the boardwalk before dinner at the 361 Restaurant on-site.
Day 2
Sunday, Apr 5
Lagoon Pools, Waterslides & the Gulf
Full resort day — kids on the Twisting Dunes slide while adults claim a swim-up bar stool. MEblue beach service sets up chairs and umbrella on the Gulf side; the 100-yard boardwalk connects both worlds. Sunday brunch at the 361 is a local tradition worth building the morning around.
Day 3
Monday, Apr 6
Final Dip & Departure
One last soak in a hot tub before the 11 AM checkout. The resort's ice cream stand (Frozen Station, Blue Bell) is the perfect send-off. A quick drive and you're back in Corpus before lunch.
Resort Activities & Extras
Lagoon Pool Complex, Waterslide, Lap Pool, Hot TubsIncluded
MEblue Beach Service (chairs, umbrella, shade)~$50–90/setup · Pre-book
361 Restaurant Sunday Brunch~$20–35/person
Frozen Station (Blue Bell ice cream poolside)~$4–8/person
Pool Cabana RentalSurcharge · Confirm availability
Swim-Up Bar~$10–15/drink
Agent's Note

Port Royal has the most resort infrastructure of the three options — 4 pools, a waterslide, swim-up bar, on-site dining, and a Sunday brunch tradition since 1984. However, the renovation running through August 2026 is a real concern for April. Recent reviews mention broken elevators, fenced-off areas, and closed amenities. Verify the specific status of the waterslide, pools, and common areas before committing to this at its higher price point.

Additionally, this option requires 2 rooms (the group of 9 exceeds the 6-person capacity per suite), which means the family is split between rooms and the starting price rises to $2,326.66. Best value here only materializes if the full pool complex is operating — call ahead. If renovation-related closures are confirmed, Executive Keys or Cinnamon Shore are more reliable choices for this trip.

Starting From$711.54
Sample Itinerary
Day 1
Saturday, Apr 4
Arrival & Settle In
A short drive from Corpus and you're on the island. The townhome layout gives adults and kids their own space to unwind after the easy trip over. Pool time in the afternoon, then cook a group dinner in — the kitchen makes it easy and the savings versus the resort options leave plenty of budget for activities.
Day 2
Sunday, Apr 5
Beach Day & Island Exploring
Rent a golf cart in town and spend the day bouncing between the beach, the pool, and the Port Aransas shops and waterfront. The budget savings on accommodation free up real money for fishing charters, dolphin tours, or a group dinner out at Fins Grill or Trout Street Bar.
Day 3
Monday, Apr 6
Morning Dip & Checkout
One last pool morning before the 11 AM checkout. Load up, grab breakfast tacos, and head back to Corpus. A lean, well-priced trip that leaves budget in everyone's pocket.
Agent's Note

This is the lowest starting price on the list at $711.54 — roughly $350 less than Executive Keys and $800 less than Port Royal at their quoted room class. The townhome style and 10-person capacity are genuine advantages: the whole group fits comfortably with room to spare, and the multi-level layout gives adults and kids some separation in the evenings.

What to watch: This listing has only 8 reviews (vs. 39 for Cinnamon Shore), so it's a less-proven quantity. The property description is also less specific than the others — confirm exact bedroom count, bed configuration, and proximity to beach before booking. The property fee of $310.35 is notably high relative to the base nightly rate, which suggests a larger/premium unit than the $119/night average implies. That's actually a positive signal for space and quality. Worth a quick call to verify details.

Best for a group that wants maximum space and minimum spend, and is comfortable doing a little more legwork on confirmation.

Agent's Pick ✓ Recommended
Agent's Summary

Four options, four price points. The Port A Townhome at $711.54 is the lowest-cost choice and has the most capacity (sleeps 10), but comes with the least review history — worth a quick confirmation call before committing. Executive Keys at $1,164.94 is the proven sweet spot: beachfront, fully rebuilt, sleeps 9 in one unit, and has a strong track record. Cinnamon Shore at $1,513.16 is the highest-rated property and the most effortless resort experience — worth the upgrade if the budget allows. Port Royal at $2,326.66 requires 2 rooms, costs the most, and carries real renovation risk through August 2026 — verify pool and waterslide status before considering it at this price.
